## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and website optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant spike in traffic: 373 clicks (300+ this week) and 132,000 impressions, surpassing expectations for week 5 post-content launch](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - High-ranking keywords already emerging: Some articles ranking \#1, \#2, and \#4 for target keywords
  - [Website migration effects: Ongoing investigation into URL structure changes (trailing slash removal) and indexing issues](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Content strategy success: Leads being generated from new articles, with visitors citing Google search as the source](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)

## Topics

### Traffic Spike and SEO Performance

  - [Dramatic increase in clicks (373 total, 300+ this week) and impressions (132,000 this week)](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Performance exceeding expectations for week 5 post-content launch (typically seen in month 3)](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - Some articles already ranking highly for target keywords (e.g., "texting vs email in workplace" at \#1)
  - [45 articles published, 8 new articles ready for review and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)

### Website Migration and Technical SEO

  - [Investigation into URL structure changes (removal of trailing slashes)](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - Unusual URL variants appearing in Google Search Console (e.g., with "\#TOC" additions)
  - [18 pages currently not indexed, down from 35 previously](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [Some thin content identified as potential cause for non-indexing](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [Discrepancies between Google Search Console reports and actual indexing status](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)

### Content Strategy and Optimization

  - [Leads being generated from new content, with visitors citing Google search](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Plan to implement CTA elements and income-focused components in articles](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [Suggestion to create flexible, plug-and-play CTA modules for various purposes (lead generation, content engagement)](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Consideration of content refreshes for historically valuable pages to boost quality signals](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)

### Indexing and Crawl Budget

  - [Manual indexing requests planned for high-value pages (limit of 10 per day)](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Discussion on crawl budget optimization and potential content pruning in the future](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Ongoing monitoring of indexing issues and their resolution over time](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement interlinking strategy focusing on best-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Investigate cause of unusual URL variants in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Create task in Airtable for retroactively adding CTAs to published articles](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [Manually request indexing for high-value pages not currently indexed](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Continue monitoring indexing issues and traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
  - [Follow up with Jessica regarding URL structure changes and site map](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Consider refreshing content for historically valuable pages to boost quality signals](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Explore implementation of flexible CTA modules with Yourco's design team](https://fathom.video/share/GNPw7ypWAHxVVC5hYe38Vxgyfjxy6N76?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
